servers.name: podcast-commerce-intelligence
servers.description: Extract affiliate products, sponsors, and brand recommendations from podcast transcripts. Returns structured product data with confidence scores, recommendation strength, and affiliate links.

tools.name: extract_podcast_products
tools.description: Extract affiliate products, sponsored brands, and product recommendations from a podcast transcript.

tools.name: analyze_episode_sponsors
tools.description: Identify sponsor segments and estimate read-through rates and CPM.

tools.name: track_product_trends
tools.description: Compare product mentions across multiple episodes to detect rising and falling trends.
